etymology.description: цнв(цнв, 'foot') + шИЯ(шИЯ, 'boat') = a forward-moving action -> later revised with хИА ('knife') to form the original of хЙк (with цнм as phonetic)
etymology.interpretation: цнм originally depicted a foot and a boat, symbolizing forward movement, and was later used phonetically in conjunction with хИА ('knife') to form хЙк, meaning 'to cut'.
